name: Injera-Ethiopian Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flours, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
2. Stir in the egg and club soda until the batter is creamy.
3. Cook the batter on a buttered skillet.
4. Fry 2 tablespoons of batter for 1-2 minutes on one side only.
5. Serve warm with or under main dishes. The club soda acts as a sourdough starter replacement. (This is made in the same manner as crepes in a pan.)
